citation_short: IACtHR, Massacres of El Mozote v. El Salvador (2012)
title: Case of the Massacres of El Mozote and Nearby Places v. El Salvador
geographic_scope: El Mozote and nearby places, Morazán
strengths: Authoritative synthesis of the massacre sequence, military participation scale, and major forensic findings.
limitations: Does not resolve a DR-ready exposed-civilian denominator or same-episode combatant-victim total.

title: From Madness to Hope: the 12-year war in El Salvador
author_or_org: United Nations Truth Commission for El Salvador
geographic_scope: El Mozote and nearby villages, Morazán
strengths: Canonical truth-commission finding that more than 200 civilians were deliberately killed in El Mozote village proper.
limitations: Not a denominator source; village-proper count is narrower than the full cluster.
notes: Useful for keeping the cluster total and village-proper total conceptually separate.
